- Kitchen room with counter/appliance geometry

- Static lighting and ground plane
- World file to live in tb_worlds/worlds/house_world.sdf (analogous to maze_world.sdf)

new_value:
{"description":"Populate the house SDF world with navigable obstacles:
- Kitchen: table, chairs, kitchen island (if space allows)
- Living room: sofa, coffee table, TV stand
- Bedrooms: bed, nightstand, wardrobe/dresser
- Garage: workbench, toolbox, shelving unit, spare tyres stacked against wall (the car itself is placed in gr3 as a static world element)
- Use Gazebo model library assets where available, or simple SDF geometry primitives
- Ensure all obstacles are collision-enabled with appropriate inertia
- Leave clear navigation corridors (min 0.5m) for TurtleBot3
- Place colored target blocks (blue/red/green) analogous to maze world for vision behaviors"}

new_value: {"notes":"Borrowed AWS RoboMaker small house world (sethgi:ros2_jazzy fork, PR#47). 68 Jazzy-compatible residential models copied to tb_worlds/models/. World wrapped in SDF.xacro with gz-sim Harmonic plugins (same pattern as sim_house_enhanced). Pre-built Nav2 map included. demo-world-house service added to docker-compose using same overlay image — no rebuild needed. GZ_SIM_RESOURCE_PATH set to include models dir. PR#17 raised."}

{"id":"turtlebot-maze-c1m","title":"Incorporate AWS RoboMaker bookstore world as a third simulation environment","description":"Integrate the AWS RoboMaker bookstore world (Gazebo Harmonic migration, PR#21 by binner2) as a third launchable environment alongside maze and house worlds.

Source: https://github.com/aws-robotics/aws-robomaker-bookstore-world/pull/21
- Full migration from Gazebo Classic to Gazebo Harmonic (SDF 1.9, DART physics)
- 38 retail models: bookshelves (A/B/C), books (A-F), info desk, columns, chairs, computers, etc.
- Updated mesh URIs from file://models/ to model:// format

Implementation (mirrors house world approach):
- Clone PR#21 branch and copy models to tb_worlds/models/aws_robomaker_retail_*/
- Adapt worlds/bookstore.world → tb_worlds/worlds/bookstore_world.sdf.xacro
  (add xacro headless arg + gz-sim Harmonic plugin declarations)
- Copy or generate Nav2 occupancy map → tb_worlds/maps/bookstore_world_map.{pgm,yaml}
- Add demo-world-bookstore service to docker-compose.yaml
  (same overlay image as house/maze — no rebuild needed)
- Set GZ_SIM_RESOURCE_PATH to include models dir

The bookstore world features a retail shop interior with bookshelves as navigation
obstacles — good for testing goal-to-goal navigation in a structured commercial space.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"pantelis.monogioudis@aegean.ai","created_at":"2026-03-02T14:17:14Z","created_by":"Pantelis Monogioudis","updated_at":"2026-03-02T14:17:14Z"}

new_value: {"notes":"Cloned binner2:ros2 (PR#21). 34 Harmonic-compatible retail models copied to tb_worlds/models/. World adapted to SDF.xacro with gz-sim plugins and ODE physics (consistent with other worlds). Pre-built Nav2 map included. demo-world-bookstore service added to docker-compose — same overlay image, no rebuild needed. Committed on feat/house-world-aws branch alongside the house world."}

{"id":"turtlebot-maze-q91","title":"Incorporate AWS RoboMaker small warehouse world as a fourth simulation environment","description":"Integrate the Jazzy/Harmonic-patched AWS RoboMaker small warehouse world (Juancams:ros2-jazzy, PR#27) as a fourth launchable environment.

Source: https://github.com/aws-robotics/aws-robomaker-small-warehouse-world/pull/27
- Fixes mesh URIs from file://models/ to model:// format (Gazebo Harmonic compatible)
- No-roof variant used for unobstructed TurtleBot navigation
- Already includes gz-sim plugin declarations in the world file

14 warehouse models: shelves (D/E/F), walls, ground, roof, lamp, bucket, pallet jack,
desk, trash can, and clutter objects (A/C/D)

Implementation (same pattern as house/bookstore):
- Clone Juancams:ros2-jazzy, copy models to tb_worlds/models/aws_robomaker_warehouse_*/
- Adapt worlds/no_roof_small_warehouse/ to tb_worlds/worlds/warehouse_world.sdf.xacro
  (add xacro headless arg, make SceneBroadcaster conditional)
- Copy Nav2 map (maps/002/map.pgm) to tb_worlds/maps/warehouse_world_map.{pgm,yaml}
- Add demo-world-warehouse service to docker-compose.yaml
  (same overlay image — no rebuild needed)","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"pantelis.monogioudis@aegean.ai","created_at":"2026-03-02T14:22:50Z","created_by":"Pantelis Monogioudis","updated_at":"2026-03-02T14:22:50Z"}

new_value: {"notes":"Cloned Juancams:ros2-jazzy (PR#27). Used no_roof variant (roof commented out — better for nav). 14 warehouse models copied. World already had gz-sim plugins; wrapped in SDF.xacro to add headless arg and make SceneBroadcaster conditional. Maps/002 map used (0.02m resolution). demo-world-warehouse added to docker-compose on feat/house-world-aws branch."}
